Dynamic Bindings in p-if Test

Tests that :src, :alt, :style bindings work correctly inside p-if blocks when loaded via RemoteRender

Conditional Bindings Test

Case 1: Bindings INSIDE p-if (BUG)

Case 2: Bindings OUTSIDE p-if (should work)
